WhyUs.heading: Information technology for modern age
WhyUs.description1: iT SYSTEMS specializes in design, development, and maintenance of business software. As a system integrator, we offer comprehensive IT solutions tailored for the modern age.
WhyUs.description2: Our business philosophy is built on a "customer first" approach. We focus on quality and long-term support, offering the optimal balance of price and functionality in the local market.

Geodet.heading: Geodet
Geodet.description: The leading application for automatic processing of geodetic data in BiH. Generate standard geodetic forms and transform coordinates in seconds.

f1.title: Instrument support
f1.description: Seamless integration for Topcon, Leica, Sokkia, Trimble, Nikon, and Ruide devices.

f2.title: Automatic forms
f2.description: Generate TZ, O1i2, O1v, O8, O25 forms directly in Excel format.

f3.title: CAD Integration
f3.description: Export to AutoCAD, ZWCAD, BricsCAD, MicroStation, and Google Earth.

pricing.heading: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Flexible licensing options with volume discounts available.

geodet-profili.title: Geodet Profiles
geodet-profili.description: Visualization and drawing of geodetic terrain profiles with flexible data import.

proman.title: ProMan
proman.description: Electronic protocol and document management with a centralized archive.

dkv-pro.title: DKV-PRO
dkv-pro.description: Software package for power line design and electromechanical calculations.

fb1.heading: Coordinate transformation in seconds
fb1.description: Precise conversion between all relevant coordinate systems used in Bosnia and Herzegovina. Over 100 predefined datums available instantly.

points.p1: Support for WGS84, Gauss-Krüger, D-48, D-96, and UTM systems
points.p2: Batch processing — transform thousands of points at once
points.p3: Import from ASCII, CSV, and standard geodetic formats

fb2.heading: Automatic GPS report generation
fb2.description: From raw GNSS measurements to professional reports in a few clicks. Data is automatically formatted to Federal Geodetic Administration standards.

points.p1: Direct import from Leica, Trimble, and Topcon GNSS receivers
points.p2: Automatic calculation of coordinates, elevations, and measurement errors
points.p3: Export to Excel format ready for client submission

fb3.heading: Direct integration with CAD tools
fb3.description: Geodetic data immediately available in your CAD environment. No manual entry, no transfer errors — direct export to all popular formats.

points.p1: Support for AutoCAD, ZWCAD, BricsCAD, and MicroStation
points.p2: Export to DXF, DWG, KML, SHP, PDF, and DGN formats
points.p3: Google Earth visualization with one click

ctaBanner.heading: Ready to modernize your geodetic processes?

GeodetProfili.heading: Geodet Profiles
GeodetProfili.description: Specialized application for visualization and drawing of geodetic terrain profiles. Flexible data import from various sources with professional profile generation.

f1.title: Profile visualization
f1.description: Generation of longitudinal and cross profiles with automatic dimensioning and legend.

f2.title: Flexible import
f2.description: Support for data import from Geodet application, ASCII files, and Topcon and Leica formats.

f3.title: Result export
f3.description: Export profiles to DXF, PDF, and Excel formats for further processing and presentation.

pricing.heading: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Flexible licensing options with volume discounts available.

geodet.title: Geodet
geodet.description: Automatic processing of geodetic data and generation of standard forms.

proman.title: ProMan
proman.description: Electronic protocol and document management with a centralized archive.

dkv-pro.title: DKV-PRO
dkv-pro.description: Software package for power line design and electromechanical calculations.

fb1.heading: Precise terrain visualization
fb1.description: Generate professional longitudinal and cross-sectional terrain profiles directly from measured data. Automatic dimensioning and legend to geodetic industry standards.

points.p1: Longitudinal and cross profiles with automatic dimensioning
points.p3: Real-time visual preview during data import

fb2.heading: Import from all geodetic sources
fb2.description: Direct import from the Geodet application, ASCII files, and formatted Topcon and Leica instrument files — no manual transcription.

points.p1: Geodet application compatibility for direct point transfer
points.p2: Support for ASCII, Topcon FC, and Leica GSI formats

fb3.heading: Export ready for submission
fb3.description: Generated profiles immediately available in standard formats for archiving, further design, or client presentation.

points.p1: DXF export for AutoCAD and other CAD tools
points.p2: PDF export with geodetic firm header and stamp
points.p3: Excel tables with detailed tabular point listing

ProMan.heading: ProMan
ProMan.description: Electronic protocol and document management system. Centralize your archive, automate business processes, and track document flow in real time.

f1.title: Electronic protocol
f1.description: Automatic registration, classification, and tracking of documents with unique protocol numbers.

f2.title: Central archive
f2.description: Digital archive of all documents with advanced search by content, date, and category.

f3.title: Process management
f3.description: Define workflows, automatic notifications, and track task status across your team.

help-desk.title: Help Desk
help-desk.description: Online ticketing system for efficient technical support and customer care.

ervip.title: ERVIP
ervip.description: Complete solution for time tracking and access control.

geodet.title: Geodet
geodet.description: Automatic processing of geodetic data and generation of standard forms.

fb1.heading: Every document in the right place
fb1.description: Automatic protocol registration with a unique number — from incoming letters to internal decisions. The end of paper-based records and manual transcription.

points.p1: Automatic protocol number on each document entry
points.p2: Classification by type, date, officer, and status
points.p3: Document flow tracking through all processing stages

fb2.heading: Digital archive with instant search
fb2.description: Everything you have ever filed is available in seconds. Search by content, date, officer, or protocol number — without rifling through folders.

points.p1: Full-text search across all scanned document content
points.p2: Filters by year, category, department, and status

fb3.heading: Processes that run without stopping
fb3.description: Define who approves what and by when. Automatic notifications ensure no task is left unfinished.

points.p1: Visual workflow editor with roles and deadlines
points.p2: Email and in-app notifications at each step
points.p3: Status dashboard for all active processes in the team

ctaBanner.heading: Ready to digitize your document management?

DkvPro.heading: DKV-PRO
DkvPro.description: Professional software package for power line and overhead line design. Electromechanical calculations, route profiling, and technical documentation generation.

f1.title: Electromechanical calculations
f1.description: Automatic calculations of mechanical stress, conductor sag, and ground wire per standards.

f2.title: Route profiling
f2.description: Visualization and optimization of power line routes with automatic tower positioning.

f3.title: Technical documentation
f3.description: Generation of complete project documentation, assembly tables, and material specifications.

proman.title: ProMan
proman.description: Electronic protocol and document management with a centralized archive.

geodet.title: Geodet
geodet.description: Automatic processing of geodetic data and generation of standard forms.

ervip.title: ERVIP
ervip.description: Complete solution for time tracking and access control.

fb1.heading: Calculations to domestic and EU standards
fb1.description: Automatic electromechanical calculations of conductor mechanical stress, sag, and ground wire for all climatic cases per BAS and EN standards.

points.p1: Sag and stress calculations for all climatic cases (ice, wind, min. temp.)
points.p2: Support for single and multi-strand conductors (Al, Cu, ACSR, OPGW)
points.p3: Automatic compliance check against electrical regulations

fb2.heading: Route optimization in minutes
fb2.description: Plot the route on the terrain, import topographic data, and visualize the profile with tower positions — all in one tool.

points.p1: Visual route profile with automatic tower positioning
points.p2: Import of topographic data from ASCII and geodetic files
points.p3: Automatic calculation of span lengths and tower heights

fb3.heading: Complete project documentation in one click
fb3.description: From calculations to final project documentation without manual transcription. All tables, specifications, and drawings are generated automatically.

points.p1: Assembly tables and material specifications per project
points.p2: Technical description and situational plan in PDF format
points.p3: Support for projects from 35 kV to 400 kV

ctaBanner.heading: Ready for professional power line design?

Ervip.heading: ERVIP
Ervip.description: Complete solution for time tracking and access control. Biometric identification, automatic hour calculation, and payroll system integration.

f1.title: Biometric tracking
f1.description: Support for fingerprint, card, and PIN code with instant employee identification.

f2.title: Automatic calculation
f2.description: Calculation of regular hours, overtime, night shifts, and annual leave.

f3.title: Access control
f3.description: Management of access zones, time schedules, and security levels.

pricing.heading: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Price depends on the number of terminals and employees.

dkv-pro.title: DKV-PRO
dkv-pro.description: Software package for power line design and electromechanical calculations.

fb1.heading: Paperless biometric attendance
fb1.description: Employees clock in and out via fingerprint, card, or PIN. The system records everything automatically — you get precise data for payroll.

points.p1: Support for fingerprint, RFID card, and PIN identification
points.p2: Instant identification and registration — no waiting
points.p3: Online and offline operation (terminal stores data locally)

fb2.heading: Automatic calculation without errors
fb2.description: The system automatically calculates regular hours, overtime, night shifts, and annual leave according to your internal rules and legal requirements.

points.p1: Shift definitions, work time schemes, and tolerance settings
points.p2: Automatic overtime and on-call hour calculation
points.p3: Export for payroll system in Excel and standard formats

fb3.heading: Zone-based access management
fb3.description: Define who can access which areas and at what times. The system automatically blocks unauthorized access and maintains a complete passage history.

points.p1: Unlimited access zones and terminal points
points.p2: Time-based access schedules per employee and group
points.p3: Complete passage history for every terminal

ctaBanner.heading: Ready to automate your time tracking?

HelpDesk.heading: Help Desk
HelpDesk.description: Online ticketing system for efficient technical support and customer care. Track requests, manage priorities, and measure service quality in real time.

f1.title: Ticketing system
f1.description: Create, track, and resolve requests with automatic assignment to the support team.

f2.title: SLA management
f2.description: Define service levels, automatic escalations, and response time tracking.

f3.title: Customer portal
f3.description: Web portal for users with a knowledge base, FAQ section, and request status tracking.

pricing.heading: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Per-agent licensing with unlimited end users.

proman.description: Electronic protocol and document management with a centralized archive.

ervip.title: ERVIP
ervip.description: Complete solution for time tracking and access control.

geodet.title: Geodet
geodet.description: Automatic processing of geodetic data and generation of standard forms.

fb1.heading: All requests in one place
fb1.description: Every user request becomes a ticket with a priority, deadline, and assigned agent. Nothing is forgotten, everything is visible and measurable.

points.p1: Automatic ticket creation from email, web, and phone
points.p2: Categories, tags, and priorities for quick sorting
points.p3: Full communication history with each user on one screen

fb2.heading: SLA that tracks itself
fb2.description: Define response and resolution deadlines by request type. The system monitors compliance and automatically escalates overdue tickets.

points.p1: SLA policy definition by ticket category and priority
points.p2: Automatic escalation to agent or manager when deadline is exceeded
points.p3: SLA compliance reports by agent and team

fb3.heading: Users find answers themselves
fb3.description: A knowledge base reduces ticket volume and eases the burden on your support team. Users find solutions on their own, 24/7, without waiting for an agent.

points.p1: User-facing portal with a searchable knowledge base
points.p2: FAQ section with the most common questions per product
points.p3: Own ticket status tracking without contacting an agent
